messages.content: These risk write-ups share funnel target nodes, which does NOT make them the same risk — a funnel is coarse, so mechanistically distinct risks (a certification clock, a grid-connection queue, a distributor line-review cycle) can all compile to the same node. PARTITION the cluster into groups of TRUE duplicates: same underlying mechanism, same causal story, such that presenting both to a client would read as repetition. Distinct risks come back as singleton groups (absorbs: []). For a genuine duplicate group, pick the best exemplar (sharpest mechanism, best evidence) as keepId and fold the absorbed write-ups' UNIQUE early-warning indicators into it. Over-merging destroys distinct insights — when in doubt, keep them separate.

content: {"rationale":"The cluster contains six write-ups sharing the serviceableFactor node. Several are the SAME mechanism: risks 1, 4, and 6 all argue the EU regulatory/certification stack (WEEE, RoHS, EORI, EED 2024/1791, 2024/1364) is undercounted and gates/serializes serviceable reach below the 0.45 band — same causal story, presenting all three would read as repetition. Risk 6 (per-country access stack) has the sharpest mechanism (serialization against a 12-month clock, stiftung EAR lead times) and absorbs 1 and 4. Risk 3 (stock vs flow / channel-coverage) is a mechanistically distinct argument: reach is BUILT via distributor contracts and country-by-country channel, not primarily a certification-clock story — kept separate. Risk 2 (Eichrecht/MessEG legal metrology forecloses billing-grade metering, destroying the differentiation) is a distinct legal regime and a value-proposition mechanism, not a general cert-stack point. Risk 5 (Legrand dual-brand DCIM integration lock) is a competitive-foreclosure/software-lock mechanism, entirely distinct. These stay as singletons.","groups":[{"keepId":"risk.regulatory-gauntlet.per-country-access-stack","absorbs":["risk.ledger-self-audit.serviceable-factor-conflation","risk.base-rate-analogy.regulatory-stack-undercounted-serviceable"],"foldedIndicators":[{"signal":"Certification and disclosure requirements appearing in CE operator PDU/rack-power tender prequalification lists (EED 2024/1791 KPI or 2024/1364 rating-scheme references)","where":"Frankfurt/Amsterdam/Warsaw colocation procurement packages; hyperscaler supplier-onboarding portals","threshold":"EED 2024/1791 KPI or 2024/1364 rating-scheme references in ≥2 of first 5 target-account tenders","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Implementation timeline and scope of the EU DC rating scheme and EED delegated acts","where":"EUR-Lex / European Commission energy-efficiency dockets for Directive 2024/1791 and Delegated Regulation 2024/1364","threshold":"Supplier-facing obligations confirmed to apply at equipment-procurement level within 12 months","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Own certification program milestones vs plan (CE, TÜV, RoHS/WEEE registration, EORI)","where":"Internal cert tracker vs notified-body lead-time quotes","threshold":"Any critical cert slipping past month 6 of the launch window","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Component-level efficiency and sustainability documentation appearing as mandatory annexes in CE colo/enterprise RFQs","where":"DE/NL data-centre fit-out RFQs and operator supplier-qualification questionnaires","threshold":"≥2 RFQs in the first two quarters listing EED-KPI or 2024/1364-aligned documentation as a mandatory annex","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"National enforcement cadence of EED transposition on data-centre operators","where":"German EnEfG data-centre reporting portal and BMWK implementation guidance releases","threshold":"First enforcement/reporting deadline enforced on operators ≤ Year-1 window","updates":"increases"}]},{"keepId":"risk.execution-window.serviceable-reach-is-flow-not-stock","absorbs":[],"foldedIndicators":[]},{"keepId":"risk.regulatory-gauntlet.eichrecht-metering-foreclosure","absorbs":[],"foldedIndicators":[]},{"keepId":"risk.competitive-foreclosure.legrand-dual-brand-intelligent-pdu-lock","absorbs":[],"foldedIndicators":[]}]}
